rag_rules: Place `assume` clauses for input assumptions within the component type `annex agree` block.
Use `expression` after `assume "label":` to define the assumption.
AGREE contracts are scoped to their owning component declaration.
generic_rules: Use visible symbols and case-provided thresholds in AGREE expressions.
Component type annexes are for interface-level contracts (assume/guarantee/eq/const).
Implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings (assign).
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use `eq name : type = expression;` to define equations.
Use `const name : type = value;` to define constants.
anti_patterns: Do not include AADL property names (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions without corresponding ports or constants.
Do not attempt to redesign the architecture during contract generation.
